offer: For medical office managers processing 10–20 appointments/week, high no-show rates cause wasted resources. We generate weekly no-show reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: High rate of appointment no-shows leading to wasted resources and scheduling inefficiencies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical office managers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical office managers with demo video
Community forums where office managers share tools
try_it: Let users try customizable reports and user-friendly dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
